rationale: Subject is a single townhouse-style unit within a row of identical semi-attached homes, marked by the orange bounding box (reticle centered on the unit). The roof is a standard 4-sided hip roof. Bounding box measured at ~192 × 250 px, but the actual roof occupies ~175 × 195 px (lower ~55 px of the box is driveway/yard). At 0.1879 ft/px, the roof plan-view rectangle is ~32.9 ft × 36.6 ft ≈ 1,205 sq ft. No valleys or rake edges visible — pure hip roof. Ridge estimated visually at ~80 px (~15 ft) running N–S through the center; 4 hip lines at ~60 px each (~45 ft total); eave perimeter = 2 × (32.9 + 36.6) ≈ 139 ft. Confidence is moderate-low due to partial tree obstruction on the south end and the tight urban townhouse setting making edge delineation somewhat difficult.
